requests.title: Medical-grade Omni-gel, 4 units
requests.body: Standard med-bay synthesis can't keep up if we take casualties at the facility. I need proper medical-grade stock before we go in, not the industrial gel Engineering keeps handing me.

requests.title: Calibration tools for drive harmonics
requests.body: The drive's running rough and I'm doing it by ear. A proper calibration kit would save us a bad jump someday.

requests.title: Cobra missile launcher
requests.body: One Cobra. Maybe two. For situations that need a wall to stop existing. I have a list of such situations. Will provide on request.
